spec.description: LGTM-style observability dashboard for solar farm node — system status, panel orientation, and sensor telemetry.

spec.title: Tracking Active
spec.description: Whether solar tracking is currently active

spec.title: HelioCore Service Health
spec.description: Health status of the HelioCore OS service layer

spec.title: CPU Usage
spec.description: CPU utilization of the HelioCore OS node over time

spec.title: Memory Usage
spec.description: Memory utilization of the HelioCore OS node over time

spec.title: Alignment Error
spec.description: Angular deviation from optimal solar tracking position — lower is better

spec.title: Tracking Direction
spec.description: Current solar tracking direction — cardinal or positional vector

spec.title: Solar Intensity Average
spec.description: Average solar light intensity across all LDR quadrants — trend over time

spec.title: Motor Base State
spec.description: Operational state of the base rotation motor

spec.title: Motor Tilt State
spec.description: Operational state of the tilt elevation motor

spec.title: Farm Node Status
spec.description: Live online/offline state of the farm node

spec.title: Motor Temperature
spec.description: Thermal reading from the motor housing sensor — monitor for overheating

spec.title: Farm Node Latency
spec.description: Round-trip latency to the farm node — spikes may indicate network or firmware degradation

spec.title: Base Angle
spec.description: Horizontal rotation angle of the solar panel base (−160° to 160°)

spec.title: Tilt Angle
spec.description: Vertical tilt angle of the solar panel (0° to 90°)

spec.title: LDR Sensors
spec.description: Light-dependent resistor readings from all four cardinal directions

spec.title: Rain Sensor
spec.description: Rain detection status from the precipitation sensor

spec.title: Petal State
spec.description: Current mechanical state of the solar petal actuator

spec.title: Solar Farm Observability
